name: Chocolate Crunch Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups "rocks" (chopped peanuts or granola bar chunks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pudding mix with 1 cup of cold milk according to the package directions.
2. Fold in the whipped topping until well combined.
3. Stir in 1 cup of cookies and the "rocks" into the pudding mixture.
4. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
5. Sprinkle the remaining cookies on top.
6. Refrigerate for 4 hours or freeze until firm, then serve at room temperature for 10 minutes before serving.
7. Store any leftover pie in the freezer.
